assessment_objectives.objective: resources to be allocated to protect the availability of resources are defined.
controls to protect the availability of resources are defined.
the availability of resources is protected by allocating resources per organization-defined criteria.
capacity & performance planning operations are conducted according to documented policies, standards, procedures and/or other organizational directives.
adequate resources (e.g., people, processes, technologies, data and/or facilities) are provided to support capacity & performance planning operations.
responsibility and authority for the performance of capacity & performance planning-related activities are assigned to designated personnel.
personnel performing capacity & performance planning-related activities have the skills and knowledge needed to perform their assigned duties.
